things.name: Church on the Blood
things.description: Cathedral built on the site where the Romanov royal family was executed in 1918

things.name: Ganina Yama Monastery
things.description: Forest monastery 15km from the city at the mine where the Romanovs' bodies were thrown

things.name: Yekaterinburg Museum of Fine Arts
things.description: Impressive collection of Russian and European art plus the famous Kasli iron pavilion

things.name: Europe-Asia Border Obelisk
things.description: Monument on the Ural mountain divide marking the boundary between Europe and Asia

things.name: Boris Yeltsin Presidential Centre
things.description: Interactive museum dedicated to Russia's first president and the transition to democracy

things.name: Historical Museum of the Urals
things.description: Comprehensive regional history museum in a 1900 building on Malyshev Street

things.name: Lenin Avenue & City Pond
things.description: Historic iron-founder's pond at the heart of the city where it was founded in 1723

things.name: Shartash Lake
things.description: Recreational lake on the city outskirts with a pebble beach, forest walks and bird watching

things.name: Ural Gems Museum
things.description: Collection of precious and semi-precious stones mined from the Ural Mountains

things.name: Nevyansk Leaning Tower
things.description: Day trip to a mysterious 1725 leaning tower built by the Demidov industrial dynasty
